applied_optimizations.name: Fused Triton kernel for elementwise ops
applied_optimizations.description: Fused Mish activation, add, Hardtanh, and scale into a single Triton kernel. Used manual tanh implementation with tl.math.exp (tl.libdevice.tanh unavailable on ROCm). BLOCK_SIZE aligned to 64 for AMD wavefront. Explicit float32 casts for loads/stores.

attempted_but_failed.name: Initial attempt with tl.libdevice.tanh
attempted_but_failed.reason: tl.libdevice.tanh is unavailable on ROCm Triton
attempted_but_failed.error: Used tl.libdevice.tanh which caused compilation failure

notes: Achieved 1.71x speedup (7.62ms -> 4.46ms) with fused Triton kernel
Key fix: Replace tl.libdevice.tanh with manual implementation using tl.math.exp
BLOCK_SIZE must be multiple of 64 for AMD wavefront alignment
Use tl.math.* functions instead of tl.libdevice.* on ROCm
Further optimization opportunities: ConvTranspose2d could potentially be optimized but is complex
